visual_description: The video opens with a person in a blue jacket lying in deep snow, reaching up through a frosted window pane at night. Then a young boy in a patterned sweater stands in the snowy yard, gazing upward toward the sky. Finally, a man with long hair walks through a warmly lit interior, carrying a wooden bat over his shoulder.
